title: uncinia macloviana var. cylindrica
intro: Uncinia macloviana var. cylindrica, also known as the New Zealand Bur, is a type of flowering plant native to New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits associated with Uncinia macloviana var. cylindrica include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to make use of its medicinal properties.
